stack_close.reason: reduced literal hitmax but converted failures into late EOS, repeated joints, extreme overgeneration, and worse coordinates

static_cross_attention_residual_5k.reason: the 1024x1024 fuser learned nearly uniform attention and a token-shared bias rather than anchor-specific motion

verified_fixed_causes: flat parent-coordinate tokenization can lose parent identity after coordinate quantization
DFS stack-close recovers exact parent identity but does not solve early coordinate grounding
the formal rootless-v3 data contract contains no synthetic root or generated tail tokens
query pose mesh and target skeleton are aligned in the current loader
surface FPS randomness is a trigger for some rows but is not the systematic failure cause
verified_open_facts: the only formal manifests contain 15903 train rows and 857 valid rows
oracle GT CHILD/CLOSE actions produce exact count and legal EOS on 18 of 18 diagnostic rows but only 0.3471 mean F1 and 0.07779 J2J
the six flat-hitmax oracle-action rows have only 0.05442 mean F1, proving action-only repair is insufficient
some hard rows make tens to more than one hundred coordinate-bin error at the root or first child before any wrong skeleton prefix exists
flat legal and hitmax root-bin L2 medians are 2.236 and 11.180 on the full valid857 set
flat and stack root predictions have x/y/z correlations 0.9794, 0.9775, and 0.9351, so the initial coordinate failure is shared
official static UniRig gives legal EOS on the selected 18 rows but the hard six still have only 0.23689 mean F1
zeroing motion worsens hard-six teacher-forcing CE from 1.67004 to 1.72049, so motion carries useful evidence
the current failure has two stages: early condition-to-coordinate error followed by self-prefix amplification
rootless geometries with variable first real joints are harder but are not invalid data and must not be rejected
local unit tests prove the zero-initialized motion residual is exact static identity and opens a trainable dynamic path after its first update

the full H100 model audit has exact initial condition and teacher-logit max diff 0.0, complete 670670337-parameter optimizer coverage, nonzero first-step AR/surface/fuser gradients, and nonzero second-step motion gradient
the rejected cross-attention residual has normalized attention entropy 0.999902 and an effective 1023.3 of 1024 keys
99.9999 percent of its residual energy is a token-shared vector; normal-versus-zero motion changes the fused condition by only 0.000008 of static RMS
bypassing that residual at inference leaves almost the same generation, while dynamic-only produces 18 of 18 hitmax on the matched diagnostic set
the old cross-attention residual static path sends zero-padded collated frame vertices to UniRig without using vertex_count, so its static condition depends on the largest mesh in the batch

official UniRig samples 4Q candidates from its supplied point set and applies FPS, while the trackable dynamic path samples 65536 vertex and triangle-surface points; their condition distributions are not identical by construction

the anchor-aligned replacement passed the full H100 CUDA audit with exact trackable-frame0 initial condition/logits, complete 665420289-parameter optimizer coverage, and the required two-step motion gradient
unknowns: whether trackable frame0 tokens preserve usable official UniRig teacher forcing and free generation before any dynamic training
whether the anchor-aligned residual learns non-shared motion updates during a scheduler-matched 5000-exposure run
whether it improves early root and first-child predictions and free rollout without regressing matched controls
whether the anchor-aligned route earns the single formal 2xA100-80 training opportunity
next_required_result: First compare untrained official-static and trackable-frame0 conditions on the same fixed rows using official UniRig weights. Only if trackable frame0 preserves usable generation may the anchor-aligned route run to 5000 sample exposures with the formal 1667-step OneCycle horizon. Submit the single formal 2xA100-80 task only if both gates pass.

active_operation.name: pretrained_condition_path_compatibility_20260723
active_operation.dev_resources: existing HGC qlogin job 124763552, 1xH100-80GB, preflight and 5000-exposure diagnostic only
active_operation.acceptance_test: matched free-generation root/first-child error, EOS/hitmax, count, F1, J2J, and GT/prediction/overlay on fixed hard and control rows; startup contract must remain exact and all trainable modules must receive the intended gradients

last_operation.name: static_cross_attention_residual_diagnosis_20260723
last_operation.conclusion: global cross-attention averaged away anchor-specific motion; replace it with an identity-preserving per-anchor residual before any formal training
